scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts BrewingDemo out/brewing-demo.mp4
scripts.render:fast: npx remotion render src/index.ts BrewingDemo out/brewing-demo.mp4 --concurrency=4
scripts.walkthrough: npx remotion render src/index.ts BrewingWalkthrough out/brewing-walkthrough.mp4 --concurrency=4
scripts.still: npx remotion still src/index.ts BrewingWalkthrough out/still.png
